home.subtitle: You're not alone. Let's find somewhere safe tonight.

describe.hint: In your own words — what you need tonight, who's with you, anything that matters. No need to share your name or exact address.
describe.placeholder: e.g. me and my two kids, nowhere safe tonight, can't be split up
describe.retry: That didn't go through. Take your time and try again.

results.title: Here's what we found
results.empty: Nothing's open right now — try changing what you wrote, or check again in a little while.

routed.title: Your way there is on the map
routed.subtitle: Follow the glowing path to {{name}}. You've got this.

location.title: Where are you right now?
location.subtitle: We use this only to find the closest help. Your exact spot is never saved.

error.denied: We couldn't use your device's location. You can set it yourself below.
error.unavailable: Location isn't available on this device. You can set it yourself below.
error.timeout: That took a while. Try again, or set your location yourself below.

location.pickOnMap: Tap my location on the map
location.picking: Tap your location on the map…
location.notFound: We couldn't find that. Try a city or a nearby street.
